30.5.3 - Who May Sign the Certification or Recertification 
(Rev. 10738, Issued: 05-07-21, Effective: 01-01-21, Implementation: 08-09-21) 

The physician or allowed practitioner who signs the certification or recertification must 
be permitted to do so by 42 CFR 424.22. A physician or other allowed non-physician 
practitioner, other than the certifying physician or certifying allowed practitioner who
